productName: Iams Advanced Nutrition Light/Sterilised with Fresh Chicken 1+ years
ingredientsText: dried chicken and turkey (35%, of which 21% chicken, a natural source of taurine), maize, fresh chicken (9%), millet, barley, dried sugar beet pulp (2.2%), pork fat, chicken gravy, fructo-oligosaccharides (0.69%), fish oil, potassium chloride.
